quoteLast: now.  Thompson said ten, but he might come a bit sooner.  We must get Norman away at once. You understand that you’re to let Mr. Merriam go to bed in his stead.  When Thompson comes you must admit him.  You can pretend to be unwilling to do so, but you must let him in without too much fuss.  You’re to tell him that Norman’s not here and has not been here--that there’s a man here who looks tremendously like Norman and that at first you fooled Margery into thinking it was Norman."
